title: Understanding Torque
text: Torque is the rotational equivalent of linear force. It is calculated as the product of the force applied and the distance from the pivot point (in this case, the hinges).

title: Formula for Torque
text: The formula for torque (τ) is given by: $$τ=F d$$, where F is the force applied and $$d$$ is the distance from the pivot point.

title: Calculate the Torque
text: Using the formula $$τ=F d$$, calculate the torque exerted on the door. Given: $$F=55.0$$ N and $$d=0.850$$ $$m$$.
